scripts.start: node ./node_modules/concurrently/dist/bin/concurrently.js -k -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.dev:backend: cd backend && pip install -r requirements.txt -q && uvicorn main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000 --reload
scripts.dev:frontend: cd frontend && npm install && npm run dev
